summary: Comprehensive UI testing of WeaveEstateHub Dash/Flask ERP application. All 4 portals (Admin, Owner, Vendor, Security) are fully functional with proper login flows, sidebar navigation, and role-specific features. Two-stage login (society selection + password/PIN/pattern) works correctly. All 28+ modules tested and working.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking 'Back to Society Selection' on login page updates auth-stage store but doesn't trigger immediate page re-render. User needs to reload page.
After successful login, URL changes to portal route but page content doesn't update immediately. Page reload required to see dashboard.

action_items: Consider adding dcc.Location refresh=True or callback to force page re-render after login
Consider adding page reload trigger after 'Back to Society Selection' click
critical_code_review_comments: App is well-structured with clear separation of portal modules
All 4 user roles have proper route mapping and content rendering
Session management uses dcc.Store with session storage type - works but requires page reload after state changes
Database queries are properly parameterized to prevent SQL injection
Password hashing uses werkzeug.security which is secure
seed_data_creation: Pre-existing seed data: 1 society, 11 users (1 admin, 5 owners, 3 vendors, 2 security), 5 apartments, 3 vendors, 2 security staff, 5 financial accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 portals tested and working. Login requires page reload after authentication to see dashboard. Test credentials in /app/memory/test_credentials.md. App runs on port 8050 (Dash/Flask, not React+FastAPI).
